content.text:
All seven plan tasks complete. PR #70 opened: https://github.com/project-ax/ax-next/pull/70.

**Summary:**
- 7 commits on branch `worktree-routines-phase-a`
- 117 conversations tests pass (98 baseline + 19 new), monorepo build clean
- `conversations:hide` and `conversations:find-or-create` are production-ready; `conversations:drop-turn` ships as a stub (Phase A allowed path)
- Schema additions: `hidden` column + `external_key` column with partial unique index
- Half-wired window OPEN through Phase B (locked at manifest level by the k8s preset assertion)
- Memory note saved for the Phase A milestone
- CI is pending — nothing to babysit there

lastPrompt: Implement docs/plans/2026-05-14-routines-phase-a-impl.md using subagent driven and keep going until done

aiTitle: Implement routines phase A with subagent driven

content: Implemented Routines Phase A foundation (hidden/external_key columns + three new conversations service hooks) and opened PR #70; all 7 plan tasks complete with 117 tests passing. Next: wait for CI to finish on PR #70. (disable recaps in /config)

content.content:
author: coderabbitai association: none edited: true status: none -- [![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/project-ax/ax-next/pull/70)
📝 Walkthrough ## Summary by CodeRabbit * **New Features** * Hide conversations: conversations can now be marked hidden, excluded from list results while remaining individually accessible * Find-or-create conversations: stable lookup and creation via external keys for (user, agent, key) combinations * **Tests** * Added comprehensive integration tests covering new conversation operations and database schema changes ## Walkthrough This PR extends the `@ax/conversations` plugin with Phase A routines foundation by adding schema columns (`hidden`, `external_key`), domain types, three new bus hooks (`conversations:hide`, `conversations:drop-turn`, `conversations:find-or-create`), corresponding store methods, query scope filtering, and comprehensive integration tests covering all new operations. ## Changes **Conversations Phase A Routines Foundation** |Layer / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Schema, domain types, and hook contracts**
`packages/conversations/src/migrations.ts`, `packages/conversations/src/types.ts`|Database schema extends conversations table with `hidden` boolean (default false) and `external_key` nullable column with partial unique index. Domain `Conversation` type and new hook payload types (`HideInput/Output`, `DropTurnInput/Output`, `FindOrCreateInput/Output`) added for routine operations.| |**Store implementation: mapping, methods, and query logic**
`packages/conversations/src/store.ts`|Store layer gains `hide(conversationId)` and `findOrCreate(args)` methods; `rowToConversation` updated to map `hidden` and `external_key` fields; new exported types `ConversationStoreFindOrCreateArgs` and `FindOrCreateResult` added; concurrent get-or-create logic implemented with `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`.| |**Query scope updates for list visibility**
`packages/conversations/src/scope.ts`|User-facing list queries exclude soft-deleted and hidden rows via additional `deleted_at IS NULL` and `hidden = false` predicates, while direct ID access via `getByIdNotDeleted` remains available for fire-log routines.| |**Plugin hook registrations and handlers**
`packages/conversations/src/plugin.ts`|Three new hooks registered: `conversations:hide` and `conversations:find-or-create` wired to handlers that gate via `agents:resolve` and delegate to store; `conversations:drop-turn` implemented as Phase A not-implemented stub that always rejects.| |**Integration tests: conversations:hide operation**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/hide.test.ts`|Test suite verifying hide operation marks conversation as hidden, idempotent behavior, not-found error for unknown/foreign conversations, and exclusion from list results for owning user.| |**Integration tests: conversations:find-or-create operation**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/find-or-create.test.ts`|Test suite verifying first call creates conversation with expected fields, subsequent identical calls return existing conversation with `created=false`, scoping by userId and agentId, soft-deleted row ignoring, and forbidden error on agent resolve denial.| |**Integration tests: conversations:drop-turn stub**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/drop-turn.test.ts`|Test suite verifying drop-turn stub consistently rejects with not-implemented error code for any input, including turns from real conversations.| |**Hidden field visibility and migration tests**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/list-excludes-hidden.test.ts`, `packages/conversations/src/__tests__/migrations.test.ts`|Migration tests verify `hidden` column defaults to false and `external_key` partial unique index behavior (allowing cross-user duplicates, enforcing per-(userId, agentId, externalKey) uniqueness, excluding NULLs, ignoring soft-deleted rows); list test verifies hidden conversations excluded from list but readable by ID.| |**Type mapping and hook manifest assertions**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/types-shape.test.ts`, `packages/conversations/src/__tests__/plugin.test.ts`, `presets/k8s/src/__tests__/preset.test.ts`|Type shape tests verify `rowToConversation` maps `hidden` field and updated fixtures include `hidden: false`; plugin and preset tests assert manifest correctly registers the three Phase A routine hooks.| ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - [project-ax/ax-next#29](https://github.com/project-ax/ax-next/pull/29): Both PRs extend the same conversations plugin persistence and mapping layer (`store.ts`, migrations, types, plugin wiring) for different Phase A vs Phase B field sets and hook implementations.
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 4 | ❌ 1 ### ❌ Failed checks (1 warning) | Check name | Status | Explanation | Resolution | | :----------------: | :--------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Docstring Coverage | ⚠️ Warning | Docstring coverage is 15.38% which is insufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |
✅ Passed checks (4 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :------------------------: | :------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Title check | ✅ Passed | The title 'feat(conversations): Phase A foundations for routines' accurately summarizes the main change—introducing Phase A foundations for the routines plugin. | | Description check | ✅ Passed | The description is comprehensive and directly related to the changeset, explaining the three new service hooks, schema additions, query changes, and implementation details. | | Linked Issues check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. | | Out of Scope Changes check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped because no linked issues were found for this pull request. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
📝 Generate docstrings - [ ] Create stacked PR - [ ] Commit on current branch

Domain `Conversation` type and new hook payload types (`HideInput/Output`, `DropTurnInput/Output`, `FindOrCreateInput/Output`) added for routine operations.| |**Store implementation: mapping, methods, and query logic**
`packages/conversations/src/store.ts`|Store layer gains `hide(conversationId)` and `findOrCreate(args)` methods; `rowToConversation` updated to map `hidden` and `external_key` fields; new exported types `ConversationStoreFindOrCreateArgs` and `FindOrCreateResult` added; concurrent get-or-create logic implemented with `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`.| |**Query scope updates for list visibility**
`packages/conversations/src/scope.ts`|User-facing list queries exclude soft-deleted and hidden rows via additional `deleted_at IS NULL` and `hidden = false` predicates, while direct ID access via `getByIdNotDeleted` remains available for fire-log routines.| |**Plugin hook registrations and handlers**
`packages/conversations/src/plugin.ts`|Three new hooks registered: `conversations:hide` and `conversations:find-or-create` wired to handlers that gate via `agents:resolve` and delegate to store; `conversations:drop-turn` implemented as Phase A not-implemented stub that always rejects.| |**Integration tests: conversations:hide operation**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/hide.test.ts`|Test suite verifying hide operation marks conversation as hidden, idempotent behavior, not-found error for unknown/foreign conversations, and exclusion from list results for owning user.| |**Integration tests: conversations:find-or-create operation**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/find-or-create.test.ts`|Test suite verifying first call creates conversation with expected fields, subsequent identical calls return existing conversation with `created=false`, scoping by userId and agentId, soft-deleted row ignoring, and forbidden error on agent resolve denial.| |**Integration tests: conversations:drop-turn stub**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/drop-turn.test.ts`|Test suite verifying drop-turn stub consistently rejects with not-implemented error code for any input, including turns from real conversations.| |**Hidden field visibility and migration tests**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/list-excludes-hidden.test.ts`, `packages/conversations/src/__tests__/migrations.test.ts`|Migration tests verify `hidden` column defaults to false and `external_key` partial unique index behavior (allowing cross-user duplicates, enforcing per-(userId, agentId, externalKey) uniqueness, excluding NULLs, ignoring soft-deleted rows); list test verifies hidden conversations excluded from list but readable by ID.| |**Type mapping and hook manifest assertions**
`packages/conversations/src/__tests__/types-shape.test.ts`, `packages/conversations/src/__tests__/plugin.test.ts`, `presets/k8s/src/__tests__/preset.test.ts`|Type shape tests verify `rowToConversation` maps `hidden` field and updated fixtures include `hidden: false`; plugin and preset tests assert manifest correctly registers the three Phase A routine hooks.| ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - [project-ax/ax-next#29](https://github.com/project-ax/ax-next/pull/29): Both PRs extend the same conversations plugin persistence and mapping layer (`store.ts`, migrations, types, plugin wiring) for different Phase A vs Phase B field sets and hook implementations.

The required threshold is 80.00%. | Write docstrings for the functions missing them to satisfy the coverage threshold. |

git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(conversations): drop unused imports; cover external_key in rowToConversation test

CI lint failed on three unused imports introduced by the prior commits:
  - plugin.ts: FindOrCreateResult (handler returns the type structurally
    via store.findOrCreate, doesn't name it)
  - find-or-create.test.ts: CreateInput, CreateOutput (the test goes
    through conversations:find-or-create + :delete, never raw create)

Also extends the Phase A rowToConversation test to assert the
external_key → externalKey mapping for both a populated key and null
(CodeRabbit noted the mapper path was covered for hidden but not
external_key). Fixed the base fixture to include external_key: null
so future Phase A unit tests don't have to remember to add it.
EOF
)"
